changeSet.author: User
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO product (name, price, info, is_available, product_limit) VALUES ('Cappuccino', 8.4, 'Small', true, null), ('Americano', 7.1, 'Large', false, 2), ('Latte', 7.8, 'Small', true, null), ('Flat white', 9, 'Small', false, null), ('Bumble', 9.5, 'Small', false, 10), ('Ice-latte', 10, 'Large', true, 20), ('Matcha-latte', 11, 'Small', true, null), ('Espresso-tonic', 11.5, 'Large', true, null), ('Matcha-tonic', 12.2, 'Small', true, null), ('Ice-matcha-latte', 13, 'Large', true, 3), ('Lemonade orange', 10.8, 'Small', true, null), ('Lemonade cherry', 12.4, 'Large', true, null), ('Lemonade grape', 14.4, 'Large', false, 12), ('Cacao', 7.5, 'Small', true, null), ('Raf coffee', 9.9, 'Large', false, null), ('Milkshake', 15.0, 'Banana', true, 3), ('Milkshake', 14.5, 'Chocolate', false, 0), ('Milkshake', 15.5, 'Strawberry', true, 7), ('Juice', 12.1, 'Orange', true, 1), ('Juice', 13.1, 'Grapefruit', true, 1);
